login.title: Welcome Back!

errors.INVALID_EMAIL_OR_PASSWORD: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
errors.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Your email address has not been verified yet.

errors.USER_NOT_FOUND: No account found with this email.
